channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Fridge freezer, pallet and wardrobe doors, 22nd March
item.description:
Fridge freezer, pallet and wardrobe doors

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Stockwell Road, Brixton, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blocked pavement, 22nd March
item.description:
Bins from 33, 35 and 37 Chantrey Rd blocking pavement where a tree narrows the path. Inaccessible for people with mobility issues of buggies. Reported multiple times over a year but no sustainable action by lambeth

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Chantrey Road, Brixton, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Old clothes just left on the street, 22nd March
item.description:
Self explanatory

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Beatty Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overflowing bins, 22nd March
item.description:
Bins on corner of Hindman road and Upland road overflowing as usual and rubbish all over the pavement. Happens every week. Not emptied every day and they need to be as a busy route to the park.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 39, Hindmans Road, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytip in Tottenhall Rd, 22nd March
item.description:
Household rubbish has been dumped around the phone box area at the junction of Tottenhall/Chequers/Tile Kiln Lane & the plastic box is opposite outside No.327 Tottenhall Rd.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Tottenhall Road, Palmers Green
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish fly tipped in Union Road (opposite #27), 22nd March
item.description:
Subsequent to use of skip hire, someone flytipped additional rubbish which remains. Has already been reported but problem not fixed and in fact the rubbish has now been moved to pavement and adjacent alleyway.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Union Road, Southborough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned car in dangerous place, 22nd March
item.description:
Although the car is taxed and has an MOT, it has been placed and apparently abandoned at a dangerous place, namely the top of Bexhill Road near the junction with Stillness Road. Vehicles turning left from Stillness Road into Bexhill Road have to swing out, possibly into the path of oncoming vehicles. The owner of FL56 BZC should be asked to move the vehicle to a safer parking place.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bexhill Road, Honor Oak, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped child car seat, 22nd March
item.description:
Child’s car seat left on roadside for over a week.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Strathaven Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flight tipped mattresses and household furniture, 22nd March
item.description:
Flight tipped three mattresses and some household furniture on Marmaton Road near number 89 opposite. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Hylton Street, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Furniture has been fly tipped blocking garage access, 22nd March
item.description:
A pile of old furniture is accumulating behind the shops and adjacent to the public footpath on Hood Avenue. People are treating the area as a dumping ground and rats have been seen, causing an environmental health issue.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 5, Stanley Way, Poverest, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping., 22nd March
item.description:
I had a skip on my drive at 82 Perry Rise Forest Hill SE23 2QL during the night some one came in and place rubbish on the skip. We bolted the gate at night they then put the rubbish on the narrow pedestrian walk way. This is in LB Lewisham Forest Hill. It needs to be cleared soon as it will become a permanent fly tipping spot to the detriment of pedestrians.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Shaws Cottages, Perry Vale, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Taghing, 22nd March
item.description:
Tagging

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 49, Combermere Road, Stockwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tagging, 22nd March
item.description:
Tagging

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Dalyell Road, Stockwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Needles behind food truck, 22nd March
item.description:
Been a problem recently

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Shoreditch High Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Garden waste, 22nd March
item.description:
Garden waste from house on corner of Budleigh crescent and exmouth road has been dumped and not disposed of

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Budleigh Crescent, East Wickham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish in the corner, 22nd March
item.description:
Our neighbour in 102 Ampleforth Road dropped all her rubbish

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Ampleforth Road, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dog poo not cleaned up on daily basis, 22nd March
item.description:
Dog poos or smears left here daily. Residents having to clean it. Kids step in poo when leaving their gates. Please remind dog owners it is an ILLEGAL hazard to leave ANY VISIBLE SMEAR. Man pictured caught leaving that smear: he refused to clean & got aggr

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Green Lanes, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Daily dog poo, 22nd March
item.description:
For 3 months, owners leave dog poos /smears at our front gates daily. I have to clean the pavement daily for the health of our children and neighbours' kids - kids step in this poo then touch their shoes. It is an illegal hazard to leave any visible smear.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Green Lanes, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead fox, 22nd March
item.description:
Very disfigured and not nice for children to see.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kidbrooke Park Road, Kidbrooke
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter dumped, 22nd March
item.description:
Bin bag ripped open and strewn everywhere
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Westcombe Park Road, Blackheath
Report on FixMyStreet
